title: Iron Door Shield
description: DOOR. DOOR SHIELD. DOOR PVP SHIELD. SHIELD AS IRON DOOR. IRON DOOR AS SHIELD.
body:
DOOR. DOOR SHIELD. DOOR PVP SHIELD. SHIELD AS IRON DOOR.
![Holding up an iron door as a shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10afb902af71d6611174e2befb82fe5b9e36f5de.jpeg)

This beautiful and carefully forged iron door will help you immensely in your minecraft player versus player combat. Some may say that a shield is more appropriate for defending yourself in battle, however those people have not considered that





door pvp
